testcase.name: test_roman_isp[src.roman_converter.Wang_c-Implementation_C]
testcase.failure:
impl = <module 'src.roman_converter.Wang_c' from '/mnt/roman_converter/src/roman_converter/Wang_c.py'>, name = 'Implementation_C'
@pytest.mark.parametrize("impl, name", [ (Wang_a, "Implementation_A"), (Wang_b, "Implementation_B"), (Wang_c, "Implementation_C"), ]) def test_roman_isp(impl, name): assert impl.to_roman(1) == "I" assert impl.to_roman(15) == "XV"
> assert impl.to_roman(4) == "IV" E AssertionError: assert 'IIII' == 'IV' E E - IV E + IIII
tests/LizhanWang/test_to_roman.py:13: AssertionError
